title: Link is a Banana...or is that Mama Luigi?
description:
My second YouTube Poop; don't set your volume too high, as there are some loud parts in here.  There are also some quiet parts, and I am too lazy to make them louder, then wait 15 minutes while the movie loads again.  Anyway, copyright goes to their respective owners.  I do not claim ownership for any material in this video.  Necessary credits are at the end of the video.  Enjoy!

Songs (in order of play):

Simple and Clean (Utada HIkaru)
You Spin Me Right Round (Boy George and Culture Club)
You Can't Touch This (MC Hammer)
